title: CULTIVE HK Event Scraper
description: Scrapes Hong Kong event listings and outputs data in CULTIVE import format.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of event listing page URLs to scrape.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl per run.

followLinks.title: Follow Links
followLinks.description: Whether to follow links to individual event pages for more detail.
